title: Importing additional column information to existing boards
excerpt:

posts.author: emillarbib (Emma Millar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created a board that is actively being used by my colleagues, but we have realised that we need to import additional columns that weren’t there when the boards were created.

I’ve tried to import these but I can only skip one column. Is there a way to import additional columns to groups that already exist?
